steps.title: Identify the plural antecedent
steps.content: The blank pronoun must refer to “the eating utensils,” which is plural. The pronoun appears in the clause “he considered ______ dangerous and unnecessary luxury items.”

steps.title: Match the pronoun to the antecedent's number
steps.content: Pronoun-antecedent agreement requires the pronoun to be plural, making “them” correct. “This,” “that,” and “it” are all singular forms that violate this agreement. That matches choice A — A is correct.
